headline: Analysts Remain Positive on CACI International (CACI) Amid Operational Momentum
summary: CACI International Inc. (NYSE:CACI) is one of the best information technology services stocks to buy now.. On February 20, Truist Financial reiterated the Buy rating on CACI International Inc. (NYSE:CACI), keeping the price target at $800. The firm updated its model for CACI, which indicates upward revisions and a higher multiple driven by rapid expected […]

headline: Embassy Bank Celebrates 25 Years with “Here for Good” Campaign
summary: BETHLEHEM, Pa., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Embassy Bank for the Lehigh Valley is proud to celebrate its 25th anniversary as the leading locally headquartered bank serving Lehigh and Northampton counties. As reported in the June 2025 FDIC market share data, Embassy Bank ranks fourth among the top 25 banks in the region based on deposits. The top three institutions (Wells Fargo, Truist, and Fulton Bank) are all headquartered outside the region, positioning Embassy Bank as the largest bank

headline: How Walmart (WMT) Is Rewriting Its Story With Tech, AI And A Richer Valuation Debate
summary: Walmart's fair value estimate has shifted from US$129.03 to US$135.90 per share, placing it near the middle of where many recent Street price targets are clustering. That move aligns with a split in analyst views, with one camp focusing on the tech and AI narrative and another remaining cautious in the low US$120s to low US$130s. As you read on, you will see what is driving those views and how you might track this evolving Walmart narrative over time. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: How The Amphenol (APH) Story Is Shifting With CommScope Deal And Data Center AI
summary: Amphenol’s modeled fair value has shifted from US$148.60 to US$169.44, indicating a higher price target in the latest run of the numbers. That move comes alongside fresh Street research that is analyzing the US$10.5b CommScope Connectivity and Cable Solutions deal, data center AI exposure, and what execution into 2026 could mean for where the shares deserve to trade. As you read on, you will see how to frame these moving pieces so you can keep up with the evolving Amphenol story. Stay updated...
